workspace.title: Experience Packages
workspace.subtitle: Build packages your team can share via WhatsApp or link to from your website. Each package has a public landing page once approved.
workspace.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, pitch, or target guest
workspace.noMatchHint: Try clearing one or two filters to widen the view.

builder.archiveConfirm: Archive this package? It will hide from public + workspace but stay in audit.
builder.deleteConfirm: Delete this package? Soft-delete; audit preserved.
builder.blocked: This package is {{status}} and can't be edited here. Pause or archive to edit, or duplicate to create a new draft.

form.name: Package name
form.targetGuestPlaceholder: e.g. Couples, families with young kids, devotees
form.shortPitchPlaceholder: A short summary the operator (and guest) sees on the package card.
form.longDescPlaceholder: Day-by-day plan, what makes it special, anything you'd say on a brochure.
form.ctaPlaceholder: Enquire now / WhatsApp us / Plan my yatra
form.internalNotesPlaceholder: Reminders for your team: vendor contacts, pickup arrangements, blackout dates.

inclusions.title: Inclusions
inclusions.intro: Pick what's included so the package page can list it clearly. Add suggestions or type your own.
inclusions.foodHint: Meals, drinks, snacks bundled in the package
inclusions.customHint: Anything else — welcome cake, photographer, decor, etc.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.intro: The text below is what guests see on the package page. The optional numeric value feeds AI Quote Drafts when you build a quote from this package.

season.title: Seasonality
season.intro: Pick which months this package runs. Leave all unticked for year-round.

empty.title: No packages yet
empty.body: Build experience packages your team can share with guests — weekend escapes, Char Dham yatra, family stays, wellness retreats. Drafts stay private until you publish.
empty.hinglish: Apne hotel ke special packages yahan banayein. Guest ko share karne ke liye public link mil jaayega.

disclaimer.title: Indicative proposal — manual verification required.
disclaimer.body: Package prices and details are promotional guidelines only. Final availability and rates must be manually confirmed by property staff before sharing with guests.
disclaimer.hinglish: Package details guidelines hain. Final rate aur availability staff manually confirm karenge.

categoryHint.WEEKEND_ESCAPE: Delhi-NCR / Chandigarh / Lucknow se aane wale short-stay guests.
categoryHint.ADVENTURE_TREKKING: Trekkers, river rafting, mountain biking — fit guests.
categoryHint.RELIGIOUS_SPIRITUAL: Char Dham yatra, temple tours, dharmik bhraman.
categoryHint.WORKATION_MONSOON: Remote workers, monsoon special long stays.
categoryHint.CUSTOM: Anything that doesn’t fit above — describe in pitch.

fieldError.SLUG_INVALID_CHARS: Slug can use only lowercase letters, digits and dashes.
fieldError.DURATION_OUT_OF_RANGE: Duration must be between 1 and 30 nights.
fieldError.MIN_PARTY_INVALID: Minimum party must be at least 1.
fieldError.MAX_PARTY_LESS_THAN_MIN: Maximum party must be at least the minimum.
fieldError.STARTING_PRICE_TEXT_REQUIRED: Starting-price text is required (e.g. "Starting ₹8,500 per couple per night").
fieldError.STARTING_PRICE_TEXT_TOO_LONG: Starting-price text is too long (max 100 characters).
fieldError.CTA_LABEL_TOO_LONG: CTA label is too long (max 40 characters).
fieldError.SHORT_PITCH_TOO_LONG: Short pitch is too long (max 280 characters).
fieldError.LONG_DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG: Long description is too long (max 8000 characters).
fieldError.DATE_WINDOW_INVERTED: Valid-until must be on or after valid-from.
fieldError.SEASON_MONTH_INVALID: Season month must be between 1 and 12.

actionError.SLUG_TAKEN: That URL slug is already in use for this hotel.
actionError.NOT_AUTHORIZED: You don't have permission for that action.
actionError.APPROVAL_REQUIRED: A manager must approve the package before it can go live.
actionError.NOTE_REQUIRED: A note is required when requesting changes.
actionError.INVALID_TRANSITION: That status change isn't allowed from the current state.
actionError.NOT_EDITABLE: This package is in a state where edits are blocked.
actionError.ROOM_TYPE_MISMATCH: The selected room type doesn't belong to this hotel.
